meta.purpose: Authoritative catalog of searchable properties, operators, and enum values supported by the Microsoft Purview eDiscovery condition builder and KeyQL editor. Scoped to eDiscovery — not the full SharePoint KQL surface.

sources.title: Use the condition builder to create search queries in eDiscovery
Use Keyword Query Language to create search queries in eDiscovery
Keyword queries and search conditions for eDiscovery (classic / 21Vianet)

notes: 'new' = Purview eDiscovery as of the Aug 31 2025 rework (purview.microsoft.com).
'classic' = legacy Content Search / eDiscovery (Std+Prem). Retired everywhere except 21Vianet (China) tenants as of Aug 31 2025.
'premium' flag marks properties surfaced only in eDiscovery (Premium).
Operator set here is the eDiscovery subset. MS-KQL defines more (e.g. WORDS, NEAR, XRANK); those are not reliably honored by eDiscovery and are omitted unless explicitly documented.
KeyQL is case-insensitive for property names and values; Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT, NEAR) must be uppercase.

booleanOperators.name: AND
booleanOperators.description: All terms must match. Space between terms in eDiscovery is equivalent to OR, not AND — be explicit.

booleanOperators.name: OR
booleanOperators.description: Any term matches. A space between two property:value expressions behaves like OR.

booleanOperators.name: NEAR
booleanOperators.description: Proximity operator. n = max words between the two terms (default 8). Free-text only; not valid inside property restrictions.

propertyOperators.name: contains
propertyOperators.description: Property contains the value (substring/term match for text; equality for enums/bool).

propertyOperators.name: equals
propertyOperators.description: Equality. Same as ':' for eDiscovery in most cases.

propertyOperators.name: lessThan
propertyOperators.description: Less than. Numeric or date only.

propertyOperators.name: greaterThan
propertyOperators.description: Greater than. Numeric or date only.

propertyOperators.name: range
propertyOperators.description: Inclusive range. For date ranges, from start-of-day A to end-of-day B (UTC).

conditionBuilderOperators.label: Equals
conditionBuilderOperators.note: Condition-builder surface restricts this to Size.

prefix.description: Prefix/trailing wildcard, e.g. cat* matches cat, cats, catalog.

notes: Wildcards inside quoted phrases are not expanded (quotes stop wildcards).
A period directly before '*' changes tokenization; don't use 'cat.*'.

dateIntervals.description: Start to end of current day (UTC).

specialCharacters.description: These characters are either replaced by a blank space in the actual search or cause an error when used outside quoted phrases. They are not indexed as content.
notes: Quotation marks allow some of these (e.g. in phrases like "Q1 review").
Nested quotation marks are NOT supported by the KeyQL editor — flag these as errors.

recipientExpansion.description: When any recipient property (From, To, Cc, Bcc, Participants, Recipients, Sender) is queried, Purview expands the match to include the user's UPN, alias, display name, and LegacyExchangeDN. This is a behavior to model in the evaluator, not a syntax feature.
recipientExpansion.disableTechnique: Append '*' to a partial address inside quotes, e.g. from:"ronnie@contoso*".
recipientExpansion.caveat: Disabling expansion may cause relevant items to be missed.

properties.name: AttachmentNames
properties.description: Names of files attached to an email message.

properties.name: Bcc
properties.description: The Bcc field of an email message.

properties.name: Category
properties.description: Outlook categories assigned by users.

properties.name: Cc
properties.description: The Cc field of an email message.

properties.name: Folderid
properties.description: 48-character folder GUID for a specific mailbox folder. Does not recurse into subfolders.

properties.name: From
properties.description: Sender of an email message. Accepts UPN, alias, or display name.

properties.name: HasAttachment
properties.description: Whether a message has an attachment.

properties.name: Importance
properties.description: Outlook message importance flag.

properties.name: IsRead
properties.description: Whether the message has been read.

properties.name: ItemClass
properties.description: Message class property. Used to search third-party imported data (ipm.externaldata.*).

properties.name: Kind
properties.description: Type of item. 'microsoftteams' covers Teams chats, meetings, and calls.

properties.name: Participants
properties.description: Any people field (From, To, Cc, Bcc). Useful for 'did X touch this message in any capacity'.

properties.name: Received
properties.description: Date a message was received.

properties.name: Recipients
properties.description: All recipient fields (To, Cc, Bcc).

properties.name: Sender
properties.description: Sender of an email message. Present as a distinct condition in the new experience; overlaps with From.

properties.name: Sent
properties.description: Date a message was sent.

properties.name: Size
properties.description: Item size in bytes.

properties.name: Subject
properties.description: Subject line of an email. Substring match — subject:"Q1 Financials" also matches 'Q1 Financials 2025'.

properties.name: SubjectTitle
properties.description: Subject (for mail) or Title (for documents). Condition-builder label: 'Subject/Title'.

properties.name: To
properties.description: The To field of an email message.

properties.name: Topic
properties.description: Summary of the main subject/theme of an email thread or conversation.

properties.name: Author
properties.description: Author field from Office documents (persists across copies). Use display name.

properties.name: ContentType
properties.description: SharePoint content type (Item, Document, Video, etc.).

properties.name: Created
properties.description: Date an item was created.

properties.name: CreatedBy
properties.description: Person who created or uploaded an item. Use display name.

properties.name: DetectedLanguage
properties.description: Detected language of the item.

properties.name: DocumentLink
properties.description: Path (URL) to a folder on SharePoint/OneDrive. Append '/*' to recurse into subfolders.

properties.name: FileExtension
properties.description: File extension (without the dot).

properties.name: FileName
properties.description: Name of a file.

properties.name: LastModifiedTime
properties.description: Date an item was last changed.

properties.name: ModifiedBy
properties.description: Person who last changed an item. Use display name.

properties.name: Path
properties.description: URL/location of a file or folder on a SharePoint site. Prefer DocumentLink in most cases.

properties.name: SharedWithUsersOWSUser
properties.description: Documents shared with a specific user (visible on that user's 'Shared with me' page). Only 'Specific people' shares are returned.

properties.name: Title
properties.description: Office document Title metadata (distinct from filename).

properties.name: FileType
properties.description: Condition-builder label for FileExtension. With Equals/Equals any of, wildcard is ignored in condition builder; use KeyQL filetype:doc* to get prefix behavior.

properties.name: Date
properties.description: For mail: created/imported date. For docs: last modified date. Condition-builder surface — in raw KeyQL, prefer Received/Sent/Created/LastModifiedTime.

properties.name: RetentionLabel
properties.description: Retention labels applied to mail/docs. Supports prefix wildcard. Labels with unsupported special characters are silently ignored.

properties.name: ComplianceTag
properties.description: Alias/underlying property for Retention Label in some surfaces.

properties.name: SenderAuthor
properties.description: Condition-builder combined property: sender (for mail) or author (for documents). In raw KeyQL, prefer From or Author.

properties.name: Identifier
properties.description: For mail: MessageID. For Teams: ChatThreadID. Lets you target a specific message, chat, or reaction.

properties.name: ContentKind
properties.description: Type/category of the content. Premium condition. Enum values documented are examples; the condition picker is the authoritative source.

properties.name: ContentSourceApplication
properties.description: Application/service where the content originated.

properties.name: SensitiveType
properties.description: Built-in sensitive-info-type NAME, or custom SIT ID. Cannot be used against mailbox content (including Teams chat stored in mailboxes).

properties.name: SensitivityLabel
properties.description: Sensitivity label applied to a document.

properties.name: ViewableByExternalUsers
properties.description: Whether a SharePoint/OneDrive item is shared with external users. Eventually-consistent: may lag after sharing changes until re-crawl.

properties.name: BusinessAddress
properties.description: Contact Business (Work) address.

properties.name: BusinessPhone
properties.description: Contact Business phone number.

properties.name: CompanyName
properties.description: Contact Company property.

properties.name: Department
properties.description: Contact Department property.

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.description: Contact display / Full Name.

properties.name: EmailAddress
properties.description: Any email-address property on the contact.

properties.name: FileAs
properties.description: Contact 'File as' listing name.

properties.name: GivenName
properties.description: Contact First Name.

properties.name: HomeAddress
properties.description: Contact Home address.

properties.name: HomePhone
properties.description: Contact Home phone.

properties.name: IMAddress
properties.description: Contact IM address.

properties.name: MiddleName
properties.description: Contact Middle name.

properties.name: MobilePhone
properties.description: Contact Mobile number.

properties.name: Nickname
properties.description: Contact Nickname.

properties.name: OfficeLocation
properties.description: Contact Office / Office location.

properties.name: OtherAddress
properties.description: Contact Other address.

properties.name: Surname
properties.description: Contact Last name.

conditionMarker.description: Marker appended by the condition builder to separate the free-text keyword portion from condition cards. Must not appear in manually-written queries — flag as warning.
conditionMarker.relatedDescription: Separator the new condition builder inserts between multiple keyword grids to enable per-segment hit counts.

notes: The SharePoint/OneDrive 4000-char limit includes keyword text + all location URLs + any permissions filters.
Nested double-quotation marks are not supported by the KeyQL editor.

searchTips: Searches are case-insensitive; Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT, NEAR) must be uppercase.
Quotes stop wildcards and operators inside the quotes.
No space allowed between property, operator, and value — `from:pilarp` not `from: pilarp`.
A space between two property:value pairs behaves like OR, not AND — prefer explicit operators.
Only prefix wildcards are supported: cat*. Suffix, infix, and substring wildcards are not.
When searching sites, add a trailing '/' to path/documentlink URLs to avoid matching sibling sites.
All dates are UTC. Time-zone display settings don't affect search semantics.
Recipient expansion means `from:user@contoso.com` also matches the same user's alias, display name, and LegacyExchangeDN — disable only deliberately.
Sent-folder searches can't use SMTP address for the sender; only display names are indexed there.
